## `Button` Component — All Accepted Props

**File:** `src/components/ui/button/button.tsx`

`ButtonProps` is composed of three layers:

### 1. `React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>` (native HTML props)
All standard `<button>` HTML attributes are spread through via `...props`, including (but not limited to):
| Prop | Type |
|---|---|
| `type` | `"button" \| "submit" \| "reset"` |
| `onClick` | `MouseEventHandler` |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |
| `form` | `string` |
| `name` | `string` |
| `value` | `string` |
| `className` | `string` |
| `children` | `ReactNode` |
| … and all other native button attributes | |

### 2. `VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>` (CVA variant props)
Controlled by `class-variance-authority`:
| Prop | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `variant` | `"default" \| "destructive" \| "outline" \| "secondary" \| "ghost" \| "link"` | `"default"` |
| `size` | `"default" \| "sm" \| "lg" \| "icon"` | `"default"` |

### 3. Custom props (declared inline on `ButtonProps`)
| Prop | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asChild` | `boolean` | If `true`, renders via Radix UI `<Slot>` instead of `<button>` |
| `isLoading` | `boolean` | If `true`, replaces the icon with a `<Spinner>` and hides the icon |
| `icon` | `React.ReactNode` | An icon rendered to the left of the label text (only shown when not loading) |

export default class PostList extends React.PureComponent<Props, State>

This is the "inner" PostList (locally aliased as `VirtPostList` by its importer). Its responsibilities are:
- Rendering the actual post list using `DynamicSizeList` (virtual/windowed rendering).
